de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.counterexample

Class AbstractSideProofCounterExampleGenerator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.counterexample.AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.counterexample.AbstractSideProofCounterExampleGenerator
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    CounterExampleAction.NoMainWindowCounterExampleGenerator

    public abstract class AbstractSideProofCounterExampleGenerator
extends AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
    Implementation of AbstractCounterExampleGenerator which instantiates the new Proof as side proof.

    • Method Detail

      • createProof

        protected Proof createProof(UserInterfaceControl ui,
                            Proof oldProof,
                            Sequent oldSequent,
                            String proofName)
                     throws ProofInputException
        Creates a new Proof.
        Specified by:
        createProof in class AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
        Parameters:
        ui - The UserInterfaceControl to use.
        oldProof - The old Proof used as template to instantiate a new one.
        oldSequent - The Sequent to find a counter example for.
        proofName - The name for the new proof.
        Returns:
        The created Proof.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Ocurred Exception
